title: Warehouse 30
description:
Junior! Your father has fallen ill, the medical expenses are piling up and our family's fund is drying up. Luckily your father's boss decided to let you replace him for his job. Will you take on the mantle and help us through this crisis?

In Warehouse 30, you are working as a clerk in a warehouse. Your daily job is to inspect the shipment notes, go through its details and find the hidden errors, then you can make the decision to accept or reject them. After that, you will also have to guide them to the correspondent warehouse. 

There are rules in the warehouse such as Product Compatibility, Temperature and Security. You will also combat contraband shipments with help from the contraband officers Clover and Hobbs. 

Managing the warehouse isn't easy, you will have to deal with problems sometimes, such as employees call in sick, product recall, broken weight, and many more. With many guidelines to follow, can you avoid making any mistakes? 

Test your wits and organization skill in this simulation game and see where your skills take you.
description_short: Take on your father's job as a warehouse clerk, inspect each shipment note carefully and direct them to where the corresponding warehouse. Stick to the rules, avoid making mistakes and subsequently fines to make enough money to help your family get through this rough patch.
